title: Create ADR for local settings persistence
description: Document the .env bootstrap plus config.local.json local settings decision, including UI writes, credential persistence, and password redaction.
close_reason: ADR 0002 created for local settings persistence

title: Create ADR for destructive review workflow
description: Document the irreversible Keep/Reject workflow contract, including move-verify-delete, conditional Keep confirmation, Reject confirmation, and cleanup-failed state.
close_reason: ADR 0001 created for destructive review workflow

title: Resolve Keep cleanup failure state
description: Record that when qBittorrent delete cleanup fails after Keep moves files, kept videos remain kept, torrent becomes cleanup-failed Attention Torrent, no silent retry occurs, and user can retry cleanup or resolve manually.
close_reason: Keep cleanup failure state recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve torrent metadata freshness rule
description: Record that UI torrent detail may use a short-lived cache, but Keep, Reject, Open, and Media actions must re-fetch/re-resolve from qBittorrent before acting.
close_reason: Torrent metadata cache/freshness rule recorded

title: Resolve media route file access security
description: Record that media streaming/open access uses torrent hash plus qBittorrent file index resolved server-side from metadata; browser never sends raw file paths.
close_reason: Media route security rule recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve local credential persistence and redaction
description: Record that qBittorrent credentials changed in UI are persisted to config.local.json, but password values are never echoed through API responses; UI receives passwordConfigured boolean only.
close_reason: Credential persistence and password redaction rule recorded

title: Resolve conditional Keep confirmation
description: Record Keep confirmation rule: no confirmation by default, but when multiple video candidates exist and not all are marked, K arms and second K confirms; button mirrors two-step flow.
close_reason: Conditional Keep confirmation rule recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve Reject confirmation interaction
description: Record Reject confirmation interaction: R arms, second R confirms, Escape cancels, button mirrors two-step flow, armed state times out after 8 seconds or torrent change.
close_reason: Reject confirmation interaction recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve Keep cleanup deletion semantics
description: Record Keep sequence: move marked candidates, verify destination files exist, then delete torrent with files through qBittorrent; unmarked candidates and junk are deleted as leftovers.
close_reason: Keep move-verify-delete cleanup semantics recorded

title: Set up agent docs, skills, Beads, and Brooks-Lint rules
description: Track repository setup for AI agent rules, Impeccable context, vendored skills, Beads initialization, and Brooks-Lint guardrails.
notes:
Adjusted vendored Superpowers skills to match Scrollable golden copy exactly while keeping Supabase/Vercel excluded.
Recorded domain split: Selected Video is preview/open focus; Marked Candidate is Keep intent.
close_reason: Agent docs, skills, Beads, and Brooks-Lint guardrails set up

title: Update AGENTS workflow guardrails
description: Add the requested Brooks-Lint, development workflow, testing, and test ownership guidance to AGENTS.md while preserving existing project constraints.
close_reason: Merged requested guardrail, workflow, testing, and test ownership guidance into AGENTS.md

title: Document subagent usage rules
description: Add the requested subagent guidance to AGENTS.md so future agents know when and how to use review, testing, refactoring, memory refresh, and AGENTS maintenance subagents.
close_reason: Added requested subagent guidance to AGENTS.md

title: Capture remaining grill-me product decisions
description: Single tracking bead for remaining domain/product decisions from the grill-me session. Use notes/docs updates here instead of creating one bead per question.
notes:
Recorded Needs Attention actions: Cleanup Retry only for cleanup-failed torrents; other attention reasons use Open Settings/Refresh informational actions.
Recorded Queue Auto-Poll: app auto-polls qBittorrent for queue updates in v1 while preserving current review focus.
Queue Auto-Poll interval resolved: poll torrent list every 15s while connected, pause when tab hidden, refresh immediately after Keep/Reject/settings save, and do not broad-poll file lists.
Recorded Vanished Torrent behavior: if selected torrent disappears during auto-poll, show attention state, disable Keep/Reject, offer Refresh/Next, and avoid auto-advance until user chooses Next or current action completes.
Recorded no-undo v1 rule: Keep/Reject do not offer undo because qBittorrent delete-with-files is destructive; safety comes from confirmations, visible consequences, and post-action status.
Recorded Default Mark rule: when torrent detail opens, only the largest video candidate is marked automatically; user must mark additional candidates to keep them.
Recorded Candidate Marking: candidate rows expose checkbox-style marking, active preview focus is separate, Space toggles marking for active candidate, arrows move active candidate.
Recorded Left-Hand Keyboard Model: WASD/Space primary one-handed controls; W/S active candidate, A/D previous/next torrent, Space toggles mark, Enter opens external, arrows secondary.
Recorded left-hand Keep/Reject keys: Q for Keep/Armed Keep confirmation, E for Reject/Armed Reject confirmation, Esc cancels armed states.
Recorded shortcut scope: left-hand review shortcuts are disabled during Typing Context; Esc may still cancel armed states or leave typing context.
Recorded Settings Panel: v1 uses inline settings panel/drawer inside Review Shell, not a separate settings route.
Recorded run mode: FastAPI serves built Vite assets for normal local production run; Vite dev server plus FastAPI is development-only.
Created ADR 0003 for Vite React + FastAPI local run: Vite dev server allowed in development; FastAPI serves built assets for normal local use.
Recorded packaging scope: no .exe or installer in v1; run from repo scripts until behavior stabilizes.
Created implementation plan docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-23-local-qbittorrent-review-queue.md covering FastAPI backend, Vite React UI, settings, qBittorrent services, path mapping, Keep/Reject workflows, auto-poll, keyboard controls, and verification.
close_reason: Implementation plan created and product decisions captured

title: Resolve Attention Torrent visibility
description: Record that Attention Torrents are visible in v1 as a collapsed Needs attention section below the normal queue, showing torrent name and reason, and excluded from normal next/previous queue navigation.
close_reason: Attention Torrent visibility recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve post-action auto-advance behavior
description: Record that after successful Keep or Reject, the app removes the torrent from Review Queue and selects the next torrent; cleanup-failed moves to Attention and also advances; empty queue shows empty state.
close_reason: Post-action auto-advance behavior recorded

title: Resolve unsupported embedded preview behavior
description: Record that unsupported browser preview shows a Preview Unavailable state with Open External as primary action, not an error unless file is missing or unreadable.
close_reason: Unsupported embedded preview behavior recorded

title: Resolve external open player behavior
description: Record that External Open uses the Windows default app in v1, with explorer.exe/cmd start fallback behavior, and defers configurable player commands until needed.
close_reason: External Open Windows default app behavior recorded

title: Resolve qBittorrent connection gating UX
description: Record that the app shows the main review shell even when qBittorrent is disconnected; the queue panel shows connection/setup state and settings remain accessible until connection succeeds.
close_reason: Connection gating UX recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve local settings persistence model
description: Record that .env provides bootstrap/default settings and the app writes UI-changed settings to config.local.json instead of rewriting .env.
close_reason: Settings persistence model recorded in CONTEXT.md, agent docs, and gitignore

title: Resolve session folder rollover rule
description: Record that when folder capacity is reached, Keep is blocked and an inline session-folder field asks for an existing replacement folder whose Folder Count is below capacity; app does not auto-create folders.
close_reason: Session folder rollover rule recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve session folder count rule
description: Record that Session Folder capacity counts all existing video files in the flat session folder plus marked candidates pending Keep, so cap survives restarts and manual changes.
close_reason: Session folder count rule recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve Keep destination naming rule
description: Record that Keep moves marked candidates into a flat session folder preserving original filename, with collision suffixes like -2 and -3.
close_reason: Keep destination naming rule recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve video candidate filtering rule
description: Record that Video Candidate filtering starts with extension allowlist only, no minimum size cutoff, with size used for sorting/display and non-video files collapsed as Junk Files.
close_reason: Video candidate allowlist rule recorded in CONTEXT.md and agent docs

title: Resolve canonical torrent file path rule
description: Record canonical path construction for qBittorrent file access: content_path for single-file torrents when available, save_path plus file name for multi-file torrents, WSL existence check before file actions, attention state on failure.
close_reason: Canonical torrent file path rule recorded in CONTEXT.md

title: Resolve completed torrent queue semantics
description: Record that Completed Torrent means qBittorrent completed filter plus progress == 1, with errored or missing-content torrents outside the normal queue.
close_reason: Completed Torrent and Attention Torrent language recorded in CONTEXT.md
